title: Canon Powershot G10
text: Lovely light but I had Delta 3200 in my camera.

title: Canon Powershot G10
text: I'm probably finding this setup funnier than it actually is. A smaller flash would definitely fit better aesthetically.

title: Canon Powershot G10
text: Depressing weather is back already...

title: Canon Powershot G10
text: Another lovely day.

title: Canon Powershot G10
text: We've had a lovely day today so I went for a cycle. Unfortunately still very muddy though.

title: Canon Powershot G10
text: It's like the Konica 40mm I have was made for this tiny SLR.

title: Canon Powershot G10
text: I rarely edit the DNGs out of this camera. I usually just go with the JPEGs, but this just has more texture and contrast than the camera gave it.

title: Canon Powershot G10
text: The second time I've accidentally used the flash in a station on a pigeon...

title: Sony Mavica MVC-FD200
text: This camera has no right to be as nice as it is.

title: Canon Powershot G10
text: Didn't seem annoyed by it today.

title: Canon Powershot G10
text: The flash annoyed him a bit.

title: Canon Powershot G10
text: Cute bird!

title: Canon Powershot G10
text: I like the way the sun hits this building in the morning.

title: Canon Powershot G10
text: Horrible day today.

title: FujiFilm X-T20 + FujiFilm XF 27mm f/2.8
text: The natural history museum is a beautiful building. I had a lovely day there despite it being half term. I tried some recipes I found online for Eterna today, and I think it turned out nice. Unfortunately my SD card has started failing though, so I've had to try and get a warranty sorted.

title: Canon Powershot G10
text: Bird. The rain started as soon as I left the house...

title: FujiFilm X-T20 + Tair 3 Phs
text: I got some lovely photos of various birds today. It's the first time I've done this and I've wanted to for a long time.

title: FujiFilm X-T20 + Tair 3 Phs
text: No birds showed up, so I took a photo of this. Funnily enough a photo of this tool in the same place is the first print I've sold.

title: FujiFilm X-T20 + Konica Hexanon AR 40mm f/2.8
text: It's been a good month for the Konica lens so far. I'm really happy with the photos I took today, just a shame I couldn't get more of the hexagonal bokeh. The black mist filter pairs really well with it regardless, especially in this kind of lighting.

title: Canon Powershot G10
text: Penguin.

title: FujiFilm X-T20 + Konica Hexanon AR 40mm f/1.8
text: I've been really liking this lens recently, unfortunately this photo didn't showcase what I wanted really.

title: FujiFilm X-T20 + FujiFilm XF 27mm f/2.8
text: Was messing with a flash I've barely used. This was interesting, getting the thin focal plane to include the text and film boxes.

title: FujiFilm X-T20 + Konica Hexanon AR 40mm f/1.8
text: Dog.

title: FujiFilm X-T20 + FujiFilm XF 27mm f/2.8
text: It's a photo of my hallway, but I'm surprisingly happy with it. It's quite interesting and makes me want to experiment more with making "scenes" like this in mundane places.

title: FujiFilm X-T20 + Konica Hexanon AR 40mm f/1.8
text: Attempted to take a photo of a lunatic, resulted in blur.

title: FujiFilm X-T20 + Konica Hexanon AR 40mm f/1.8
text: The weather was very moody and miserable today.

title: Google Pixel 8 Pro
text: My bag was heavy so I didn't bring a separate digital camera unfortunately, but I did see these cute pigeons.

title: FujiFilm X-T20 + Konica Hexanon AR 40mm f/1.8
text: Just wanted to see how ridiculous I could get the bokeh to see it a bit.
